[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010001 2
1 001011001 4
2 001111011 6
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000011110 4
7 001110100 4

12 21 001100100 3
23 32 010000000 1
34 43 000000011 2
45 54 000000001 1

67 76 001011001 4 match 1
70 07 000011010 3
